title: Teams

note.admin: Admins create, rename and delete teams and set WIP limits.
note.member: You can view your teams and set their WIP limits. Only admins manage team creation.

empty.title: No teams yet
empty.adminMessage: Create your first team to start organizing tickets.
empty.memberMessage: You are not a member of any team yet. Ask an admin to add you.

deleteHint: Cannot delete a team that still has tickets or epics. Remove them first.

wip.intro: Cap how many tickets each column can hold. Leave a field blank for no limit.
wip.rangeError: Enter a whole number of 1 or more, or leave blank for no limit.
wip.maxError: Enter a number no greater than 999.
